abilities.shortEffect: Has a 30% chance of poisoning attacking Pokémon on contact.
abilities.effect: Whenever a move makes contact with this Pokémon, the move's user has a 30% chance of being poisoned.

abilities.shortEffect: Has a 30% chance of poisoning target Pokémon upon contact.
abilities.effect:
This Pokémon's contact moves have a 30% chance of poisoning the target with each hit.

This counts as an extra effect for the purposes of Shield Dust.  This ability takes effect before Mummy.

abilities.shortEffect: Increases the same-type attack bonus from 1.5× to 2×.
abilities.effect: This Pokémon inflicts twice as much damage with moves whose types match its own, rather than the usual same-type attack bonus of 1.5×.
